benefits.description: Appetite suppression to help with binge eating and food noise
Weight loss goal from 55kg to 45kg by January 25th

protocol_notes: Planned dosing: 1mg/week, approximately 0.5mg every three days. 5mg vial ordered from Polish vendor. Reconstitution with 2ml bacteriostatic water. Planning to store in garage at ~8°C during winter or in work desk at room temperature. User has history of thyroid medication misuse (overdosed 5x dose for one month in April, resulting in temporary hyperthyroidism, now corrected). States thyroid medication dose has been re-normalized.
